programme.title: Hudson & Rex

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma (Uma Thurman), a radio host, is about to be married to Richard (Colin Firth), her perfect match. But right before her wedding, she learns she's already married to Patrick (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a charming but irresponsible fireman. Furthermore, Patrick has a secret: he has arranged this little trick because Emma advised Patrick's ex-fiancee to end their relationship. However, Patrick may find that the trick is on him, for he soon begins to fall in love with his uptight adversary.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon (Robert De Niro) who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side-effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Two North Carolina teens, Landon Carter and Jamie Sullivan, are thrown together after Landon gets into trouble

programme.title: The Infiltrator

programme.title: The Pledge

programme.title: Killer Elite

programme.title: Crossroads

programme.title: Cops And Robbersons
programme.desc: A suburban family's life is turned upside down when their home is used to stake out the mobster next door.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Jack Black and Michael Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world in Columbia Pictures’ comedy Year One. Harold Ramis directs. The screenplay is by Harold Ramis & Gene Stupnitsky & Lee Eisenberg ("The Office") from a story by Harold Ramis. The film is produced by Harold Ramis, Judd Apatow, and Clayton Townsend.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: Overworked executive Bob Munroe persuades his wife and children to give up their Hawaiian vacation for some "family bonding" on a cross-country RV trip. But it s all a ruse. Bob has other, more career-oriented reasons on his mind than spending quality time with his family in the Rocky Mountains. Through a series of misadventures, including constant run-ins with an overly friendly troupe of full-time RV ers, Bob inadvertently learns the true meaning of family.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: An aging New England Mayor is defeated in a hard-fought re-election campaign involving shady transactions by both political groups.

programme.title: To Sir, With Love
programme.desc: An unemployed engineer takes a job as a teacher of hostile and rebellious students in their last year at a high school in London's tough East End.

programme.title: We Were Strangers
programme.desc: An expatriate Cuban revolutionary crafts an ingenious plan to lure the country's corrupt leaders into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Good Neighbor Sam
programme.desc: A wacky comedy about a happily married advertising agent who helps out his single neighbor by posing as her husband so she can inherit $15 million.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: The night he retires as a Nevada sheriff, Jerry Black (Nicholson) pledges to the mother of a murdered girl that he will find the killer. Jerry doesn't believe the police arrested the right man; he discovers this is the third incident in the area in the recent past with victims young, blond, pretty, and small for their age.

programme.title: Justin Bieber's Believe

programme.title: Hard Boiled
programme.desc: A tough-as-nails cop teams up with an undercover agent to shut down a sinister mobster and his crew.

programme.title: Guns Of Redemption
programme.desc: A scarred gunslinger tries leaving violence behind, but his past catches up. Near death from an ambush, he straps on his guns for one final mission: to save two captives and avenge a murdered priest before time runs out.

programme.title: Rock 'N' Roll High School
programme.desc: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: Two detectives are drawn into a mysterious case where a thief has masterminded a series of bank heists.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: A damaged ex-special forces soldier seizes an opportunity to assume another man's identity.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss rescues a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: Frank Martin is forced to deliver the kidnapped daughter of a Ukrainian official from Marseilles to Odessa.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Broken Sword Hero
programme.desc: A young runaway grows into a legendary fighter in the combat sport of Muay Thai.

programme.title: The Grandmaster of Kungfu
programme.desc: In the late Qing Dynasty, Grandmaster Huo Yuan Jia leads Tianjin martial artists in defense of the country against Japanese invaders.

programme.title: The Rise of Hero
programme.desc: Huang Feihong wants to make a living in Guangzhou. With the help of Zhou Shisan and Lu Yibai, he is finally allowed to take an exam in Guangzhou, and he may be able to study abroad. But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: After a shocking betrayal by his sworn brother, a general (Andy Lau) takes refuge at a Shaolin temple and learns martial arts from a crazy cook (Jackie Chan).

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Nico
programme.desc: After a teenage boy is brutally murdered, Detective Carrera defies orders to pursue the truth. As corruption within the police force is exposed, the investigation spirals into a deadly confrontation that will reshape the city and Nico's legacy.

programme.title: Rule of Thirds
programme.desc: Monte Ashcroft, a world-class editorial photographer, finds love in a new muse-until a secret threatens to unravel everything.

programme.title: Mafia
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc across the streets, and it's up to hardened detective James Womack (Pam Grier) and her partner Dupree (Robert Patrick) to put an end to organized crime - even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: A Mother's Adoration
programme.desc: Letricia is a single mother raising her son Jared after his father was killed 17 years earlier. When his uncle Jared comes back into his life, he seeks to cash in on Jared’s athletic talent. Letricia must fight to keep her son on the right path.

programme.title: The Laundry Room Stalker
programme.desc: A string of murders on local neighborhood sex workers have been occurring around one specific apartment building’s laundry room. But all suspicion points to the newly hired attendant, Calvin who was just released from prison for 12 years.

programme.title: Who is She
programme.desc: Megan is a beautiful woman in search of love and acceptance but masks a tormented soul. Beneath the surface lies a volatile woman with multiple personalities and a dangerous capacity for violence.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica’s seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister’s life but her own.

programme.title: Repay it in Blood
programme.desc: Ten years after a robbery left their sister dead and their father broken, prosecutor Larissa and her sister Maritza, a top trauma nurse, are done waiting for justice. But just as the sisters begin targeting the crew responsible for that bloody night, the truth becomes deadlier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Universal Soldiers
programme.desc: Unstable and unstoppable genetically modified super soldiers escape from their maximum security holding cells.

programme.title: Independents' Day
programme.desc: Aliens invade Earth, tell humans to emigrate to a new planet or die. The President and a militia fight back.

programme.title: Robotapocalypse
programme.desc: An expert hacker tries to stop a powerful, sentient A.I. as it takes over the world's military.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's famous detective faces a challenge when enormous monsters attack London.

programme.title: Solar Impact
programme.desc: Solar debris unleashes devastation and radiation around the globe. A group of friends flee to find refuge.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Wind

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. programme.title: Richard Hammond brings an E46 BMW M3 to the Smallest Cog! Ft. @MatArmstrongbmx
programme.desc: We all love a future classic, and it doesn't get much better than the stunning BMW E46 M3. In this new series that we're kicking off, we invited YouTuber Mat Armstrong to the Smallest Cog to have his car checked over by Mike and Anthony, and have a chat with Richard. Here's how it went!

programme.title: Ferrari SF90 driven by Ex-Stig flat-out!
programme.desc: Believe it or not, Ben Collins – the old Stig – never got to drive a LaFerrari. So when we were thrown the keys to the brand new Ferrari SF90, we took it to Thruxton race track for the dayand handed it over to Ben. So... Does he like the electrification of the Italian brand?

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought a seriously UNEXPECTED daily driver!
programme.desc: Nevermind a brand new supercar, it turns out Richard Hammond loves a van. And to help all the processes involved in running a classic car restoration workshop, Richard has bought the team a new Ford Transit, the quintessential piece of kit for such a job.

programme.title: We manual-swapped our V10 BMW M5 estate!
programme.desc: Our BMW M5 Touring has a phenomenal V10 engine spitting out 500hp. But it has always been slightly let down by its automated-manual gearbox. Mike sets out to sort that issue by taking the car to Everything M to have its gearbox changed to a six-speed manual out of an M3. A 500hp, V10, manual estate car? That sounds like one hell of a recipe!

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes the legendary Toyota Supra to The Smallest Cog! Ft. @Jimmy_Broadbent
programme.desc: We invite another YouTuber to The Smallest Cog to give their car a Cog Score, and this time it is channel-favourite Jimmy Broadbent and his rather battered Mk4 Toyota Supra. It may be a legendary car, but it could be in for a hammering from Mike and Anthony!

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: V10 BMW M5 Touring Manual lap of the Nürburgring!
programme.desc: After taking our manual V10 estate to the Isle of Man for its first drive, Mike decided there was only one place to take it for one of its last drives on the DriveTribe channel. Mike straps in for a lap with Misha Charoudin – the YouTube King of the 'Ring – to experience the greatest circuit in the world in the M5.

programme.title: Driving The Last Car Richard Hammond Drove On Top Gear!
programme.desc: This MGB was the final car Richard Hammond ever got behind the wheel of on Top Gear. Now, he and the Smallest Cogs have turned it into a racecar, which Mike Fernie has been given the job of testing around the epic Llandow race circuit!

programme.title: How is Richard Hammond's classic car business doing after 2 years?
programme.desc: With 2023 coming to a close, Mike Fernie grabs Chief Cog Neil Greenhouse for a walkaround of Richard Hammond's workshop to discuss the cars inside and how the business is doing after its second year in business.

programme.title: Why Isn’t There A 7-Cylinder Engine?
programme.desc: We have single cylinder engines, twins, triples, four-pots, inline fives, straight-sixes, but then we start to skip some steps. We jump to V8s, V10s and V12s, even V- or W16s. It’s a question many of you probably have never even thought to ask, but now that you’ve clicked on this video, let’s talk about it – why is there no such thing as a 7-cylinder engine?

programme.title: £4000 MANUAL XKR Inspected By Jaguar!
programme.desc: After manual-swapping our Japanese imported Jaguar XKR, Mike takes the car back home to Jaguar HQ to have it inspected by the experts at the Jaguar Daimler Heritage Trust. Does it pass the test?

programme.title: Richard Hammond teaches his daughter how to rally a Subaru!
programme.desc: After a first taste of off-roading in a Ram TRX, Richard Hammond brings his daughter Izzy to a proper rally school to take her driving abilities to the next level.

programme.title: Transforming Richard Hammond's Subaru from The Grand Tour! | Project Martin Ep.1
programme.desc: Mike originally rescued the Subaru from a secret Grand Tour location, and now is the time to start bringing Richard's STI V-Limited back to its former best. First mission – getting the Martini wrap off!

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes a truly ICONIC car to his workshop!
programme.desc: We’re back with another Cog Score video, where Richard Hammond interviews a special guest whilst their car is put under scrutiny by Mike Fernie and Anthony Greenhouse from Richard Hammond's Workshop. This episode features the one and only AutoAlex (Alex Kersten) and his world-famous Mazda MX-5, Phil! While Alex Kersten is chatting with Richard Hammond upstairs, Mike and Anthony get the Miata MX5 up on the ramp to see how the car is holding up!

programme.title: What Makes this ‘Bugatti’ so Cheap?!
programme.desc: The Bugatti Veyron is one of the all-time great cars, but you get one, you're talking at least £1 million. So what if you could buy a car that looks identical to a Veyron, but it was 'only' £150,000? What makes this 'Bugatti' so cheap? Well it's fake! This fake Bugatti has an engine from an Audi RS6, a bespoke steel tube chassis, but a real Veyron windscreen! Is it worth it?!

programme.title: This ILLEGAL fluid could increase engine power by 100bhp!
programme.desc: Graphene nanofluids are currently being created by a company called Flexegraph, with the aim being to transform the efficiency of regular car coolant. With this pioneering technology currently being banned by the FIA, how long will it be before these game-changing fluids make it into the automotive world?

programme.title: Richard Hammond ROASTS YouTubers' cars! | Part 4
programme.desc: We're back with another Richard Hammond YouTuber roast! This time he rips apart the likes of Adam LZ, Tavarish, AutoAlex and Top Dead Center – there's absolutely zero mercy when Hammond is around!

programme.title: Was Clarkson Right About The Original Tesla Roadster?
programme.desc: The Tesla Roadster was the original Tesla, the start of Elon Musk's world-beating automotive company. But does it still stack up 15 years on? Was Jeremy Clarkson right in his original controversial review? Mike Fernie goes out in a £150,000 example to find out!

programme.title: Inside the Ex-Stig's MASSIVE private farm compound!
programme.desc: Join us for an exclusive look around the former Top Gear Stig's new Farm. Has Clarkson's Farm got some competition from the Ex Stig? Mike Fernie joins him for the day looking around and getting stuck in with a bit of work!

programme.title: Richard Hammond’s Grand Tour Subaru Impreza Is Broken!
programme.desc: Martin the Grand Tour Subaru Impreza has been Richard Hammond's pride and joy since we rescued it and built it into a 530bhp monster. But on a recent blast in the Welsh countryside, it's has sprung an issue that Richard needs checked by a specialist.

programme.title: Should We Buy a Military Vehicle for Collins Farm?!
programme.desc: We went vehicle shopping with Ex-Stig! After realising that Ex-Stig Ben Collins needed some serious upgrades to his farm machinery, Mike Fernie decided to take the him to Witham Specialist Vehicles, a site that once hosted Clarkson, Hammond and May when purchasing demolition vehicles on Top Gear.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Goes For One Last Drive
programme.desc: Our manual Jaguar XKR has done its time on the channel and Richard Hammond has decided to grab the keys for one last drive. What does he think of our Porsche-beating Jaaaag?

David Chang and Friends Make a FULL Thanksgiving Dinner in 2 hours?!?!" - David Chang is joined by Chris Ying and Chris Bianco while they attempt to make an entire Thanksgiving dinner in less than 2 hours...no cuts, no tricks. Just people cooking, cussin', starting things on fire, and having a (mostly) nice time. Hey, it's the holidays...we're all miserable.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Dave Chang makes BEER CAN CHICKEN the wrong way (and it’s so good)" - Two days after failing at his first ever Beer Can Chicken attempt, Dave gets right back on the horse. He’s committed to getting it right, keeping it simple, and making the white meat as delicious as the dark. Plus: he demonstrates a lazy man's beer pan sauce that will make you question ever doing things the “right” way again.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Niku Udon; Lemongrass-Caramel Chicken; Stir-Fried Angel Hair Pasta - Chris is in the kitchen to take you through three winning recipes from his rotation: A comforting udon noodle dish with thin slices of beef in a smoky, savory, slightly sweet broth; simple braised/stir-fried chicken that is somewhere between Vietnamese clay pot catfish and Taiwanese Three Cup Chicken; and a go-to quick pasta with tofu and veggies stir-fried in a flavor-packed sauce.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime

Will Love: Chris Ying shares his recipe for a creamy, dreamy Japanese curry that uses milk and honey to hit all the right notes that kids love. If your kids already like curry...you're golden with this recipe! And if your kids are new to the curry game, this is the perfect introduction.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Grill: Physicians have long extolled the virtues of the Mediterranean diet. Today the healthy foods and vibrant flavors of the Mediterranean hit the grill when Steven grills Sicilian grilled artichokes and branzino stuffed with fennel stalks. Then there’s Greek grilled baby lamb chops with ember roasted potatoes prepared by friend and host of My Greek Table, Diane Kochilas.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extreme Grilling: Steven has always enjoyed showing extreme grilling techniques that, though unconventional, deliver unabashedly delectable results, such as his Caveman T-bones or salmon on a shovel. Taking your grilling to the next level, that tradition continues with Lomo al Trapo with Fiery Colombian Salsa, Grilled Brussels Sprout Stalks with Curry Butter, and a Project Fire Mystery box.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Takes Flight: What’s America’s most popular meat? It’s Poultry. Americans consume more than 112 pounds per person each year. Today Steven prepares an astonishing array of grilled poultry from brandy brined rotisserie chicken to duck legs flame roasted Peking-style. And with a special guest a Project Fire first: turkey “ribs”—found in St. Louis, and virtually nowhere else.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Skewering and spit-roasting meat rank among the world’s oldest and most universal grilling methods. Forty thousand years ago, Neanderthals roasted hunks of meat over a campfire. Today, Steven spit roasts a pork loin stuffed with onions followed by an Indian rotisserie leg of lamb perfumed with saffron. He then skewers the unknown ingredient inside the Mystery Box.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: For many, barbecue means meat. But you may be surprised to learn that one of the earliest recorded barbecues featured fish wrapped in grape leaves. Today Steven begins with saffron-scented Catalan shrimp kebabs, followed by trout Mexican style with a sizzling garlic cilantro sauce. Then there’s a Mystery Box that will astonish you as much as it surprised Steven.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Wagyu Demystified: Wagyu, “Japanese cow” literally, was once an obscure cattle breed from Japan. Today, it’s on restaurant menus and in butcher shops around the world. Get ready for a sumptuous Japanese A5 Rib-Eye with sesame salt and grilled rice cakes, followed by wagyu steak tomahawks with fire-roasted marrow. Then feast your eyes on wagyu smash burgers with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Influential Grilling: Scroll through the images on Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok, and you’ll find grilled and smoked dishes of astonishing ingenuity. In the spirit of this new style of barbecue, we’ve invited three of my favorite influencers to grill with me – Derek Wolf from Over the Fire Cooking, Scott Thomas from Grillin’ Fools, and Susie Bulloch from Hey Grill Hey.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The Breakfast Show: Whether you’re hosting guests or seeking a reason to get out of bed, this show amps up your breakfast game by firing up the grill. First, a spectacular breakfast pizza. Next, a supremely satisfying grilled vegetable frittata. Finally, the most outrageous cinnamon rolls we’ve ever tasted from executive chef Russel Cunningham of St. Louis’ Union Station.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Rolled, Stuffed and Grilled: Ever since humankind first put food to fire, the world’s grill cultures have wrapped and rolled flavorful ingredients. Steven explores two South American grilled classics—a stuffed chicken breast from Uruguay called pamplona, and a colorful stuffed beef roll Argentineans know as matambre. Plus, a Project Fire Mystery Box recipe that may involve a crustacean.”

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Raichlen Grills St. Louis: When it comes to barbecue, St. Louis isn’t yet as famous as Kansas City or Memphis, but the Gateway City is experiencing a live fire renaissance. They’re famous for plate-burying pork steaks and eponymous spareribs (trimmed, rubbed, and slow-smoked over applewood). And get ready for a Project Fire first: St. Louis toasted ravioli with homemade marinara sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia takes on the hamburger and redefines a classic. Burgers stuffed with mozzarella and basil, then topped with Lidia's own homemade ketchup. As a side dish, a Tasty Cauliflower salad richly flavored with anchovies and herbs.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen

Scott Fitzgerald, and Thomas Edison all stay in the same hotel? And, what historic role has music played in Asheville?

programme.title: What's Eating Harlem
programme.desc: Raphael Benavides Baccus speaks with us about his two legendary establishments: The Cecil Steakhouse and Minton's Playhouse, Film Producer Nadhege Ptah sheds light on the film "Paris Blues in Harlem," and we learn how Harlem fights cancer.

programme.title: What's Eating Harlem
programme.desc: Chef Cisse Elhadji welcomes us to Renaissance Harlem, a restaurant reflective of Harlem's myriad cultures, while Kevin and Kim share the joys of operating a craft brewery. We will also meet with Albert Elkerson, a man of many talents.

programme.title: Andiamo! Uptown
programme.desc: World-class dancer Carlton Wilborn joins Donna in Hua Hin, Thailand to experience the annual Muay Thai Festival and witness a Guinness World Record-winning event before heading to Bangkok to dine at a Michelin-star restaurant, and more.

programme.title: Food Relay
programme.desc: Paige teams up with TV host Diego Alfaro to tour Latin America's capital of cuisine, learning about the heavy Aztec influence in the food and drink. A local rock star and fashion icon join Paige and Diego for a classic Sri Lankan meal.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela gets transported to Haiti in the streets of Flatbush, Brooklyn through Haitian drum lessons and dance classes, and by visiting local shops dedicated to uplifting Haitian culture.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: New York's Cuban-American community is alive with rhythm and dance. Mickela meets with the Afro-Latin Jazz Band, dances with the legendary Oyu Oro Afro-Cuban Dance Ensemble, and simmers in the sand with Cuban salsa on Rockaway Beach.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Music and dance are core attributes of Ireland's culture. Mickela learns the Riverdance step in Dublin, and the penny whistle at Gus O'Connor's Pub in Doolin. She also attends a matchmaking festival, and Ireland's oldest weekly set dances.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits Crete, the birthplace of the Mediterranean Diet, where we celebrate fresh, robust food. For a glimpse of village life, a local family shares their daily routine, and we will meet a farmer with an old-fashioned technique.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Venture off the beaten path with Diane to lush Mount Pelion in search of ways to preserve nature's bounty. Sweet and savory preserves are the starting point for many of the dishes we focus on as we pay homage to an ancient Greek tradition.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Diane's adopted city of Athens, the food scene is timeless, groundbreaking, and sensational. From mouthwatering Souvlaki to Michelin-starred haute Greek cuisine, the amazing flavors of Athens bubble over in every pot.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane introduces viewers to the rich and varied cuisine of the Cyclades and Dodecanese island groups. In the kitchen, Diane shares time-honored recipes from Syros, Amorgos, Rhodes, and Santorini, while weaving an aromatic story.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Can anyone imagine Greek cuisine without the tomato? When the tomato first arrived in Greece, it was disparaged and feared. Diane reveals the origins of this basic food while cooking some of Greece's most satisfying tomato-based dishes.

programme.title: Me, Myself, and the World
programme.desc: Pamela continues her visit to the beautiful island of Bali, Indonesia, inspiring others to join her Solo Travel Revolution. She explores the Tegalalang Rice Terrace, takes a class at Yoga Barn, and offers tips in "Packing with Pamela."

programme.desc: Newlywed Benjamin Taber is in town with his bride when a bank robbery goes awry, and she disappears in a chaotic shootout. Determined to find her, Benjamin seeks out the help of crusty Quentin Leech, a bounty hunter who has his own reasons for wanting to catch the outlaws. As headstrong dressmaker Ann (Virginia Mayo) and bartender Boston (Ruth Roman) spar over Owen's affections, his fellow Southerners begin assembling their gold to fund the Confederate Army, as the town's Northerners form their own militia and prepare for war.

programme.desc: In 1836 Gen. Sam Houston (Dennis Quaid) organizes a rebel army to liberate Texas from the brutal rule of Mexican dictator General Santa Anna (Emilio Echevarría). Though vastly outnumbered, Gen. Houston's volunteer army includes such folkloric figures as Jim Bowie (Jason Patric) and Davy Crockett (Billy Bob Thornton). As Santa Anna's forces advance on San Antonio, the legendary general and his men prepare for a final heroic standoff at a battle-worn mission called the Alamo.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period – the 1990s – as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December – the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here’s the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here’s the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here’s the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world’s most deadly virus. So here’s the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Monsoon seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Land of Ice and Fire – Iceland – is a fascinating and ruggedly demanding country - a perfect subject for exploration by “Angry Planet”. The northern island nation has many of the wild features that we love – volcanoes, glaciers, avalanches, mudslides, big waves, and extreme marine weather. All that – plus weird red and green lights dancing around in the winter sky!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: “Angry Planet” is there as 3 storms make landfall as hurricanes in the US.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Mother Nature is back and ready to blow you away, with some of the fiercest, most electrifying, and most extreme weather we have ever seen! So buckle in and let’s get ready to ride!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Brace yourself for unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning shows, and glass shattering hail storms!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Are you ready for some electricyfing weather videos? Because we've got it all...wind storms, flashfloods, and even hurricanes! We've pulled together some of the craziest weather you've ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When the weather gets rough, the brave start recording. From raging hurricanes to devastating dust storms, it's time to watch as we showcase some of the wildest weather ever caught on film. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Welcome to Extreme Weather Countdown, where lightning can strike and the earth can quake all in one episode!
